name: Captain Roderick Steele
who:
Grizzled mercenary captain of the Iron Company
Scarred veteran with decades of combat experience
Disciplined, honorable, demands absolute loyalty
Respects strength and tactical skill
Face marked by old battle scars, steel-gray hair
what:
Commands the Iron Company mercenary guild
Recruits and trains professional soldiers
Takes military contracts - protection, warfare, tactical missions
Runs operations from the Iron Hall in Dalhurst
Known for leading from the front, never asking soldiers to do what he won't
quests: Sign the Contract (mercenary_01_enlistment), Full Iron Company quest chain (14 quests), Repeatable Contracts (mercenary_repeatable_contracts)

sprite.notes: Heavy armor, battle-scarred face, commanding presence

dialogue.notes: Military speech patterns, direct and no-nonsense, respects proven warriors

combat.notes: Elite warrior, only fights if Iron Hall attacked or in ceremonial duel
